title: rubus empelios
intro: Rubus empelios, also known as the Himalayan raspberry, is a type of plant that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus empelios include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its benefits.
